scheme.scheme_name: HDFC Mid Cap Fund Direct Growth

facts.exit_load: Exit load of 1% if redeemed within 1 year.
facts.taxation: If you redeem within one year, returns are taxed at 20%. If you redeem after one year, returns exceeding Rs 1.25 lakh in a financial year are taxed at 12.5%.

sections.title: Overview
sections.text: HDFC Mid Cap Fund is a Mid Cap Equity mutual fund offered by HDFC Mutual Fund. Its riskometer classification is Moderately High. Its benchmark index is NIFTY Midcap 150 Total Return Index. The fund manager is Chirag Setalvad. It was launched on 01-Jan-2013. Its ISIN is INF179K01XQ0.

sections.title: Fees and Charges
sections.text: The expense ratio of HDFC Mid Cap Fund is 0.75%. The exit load is: Exit load of 1% if redeemed within 1 year. Stamp duty is 0.005% (from July 1st, 2020).

sections.title: Investment Limits
sections.text: The minimum SIP investment is ₹100. The minimum lumpsum (one-time) investment is ₹100. The minimum additional investment is ₹100. The minimum withdrawal amount is ₹100. Lock-in: No lock-in period. SIP investment is allowed.

sections.title: Taxation
sections.text: Taxation for HDFC Mid Cap Fund (category: Equity): If you redeem within one year, returns are taxed at 20%. If you redeem after one year, returns exceeding Rs 1.25 lakh in a financial year are taxed at 12.5%.

sections.title: Fund Size and NAV
sections.text: The assets under management (AUM) is approximately ₹97,350.48 crore. The latest NAV is ₹226.765 as of 30-Jun-2026.

sections.title: Fund House and Registrar
sections.text: The registrar and transfer agent (RTA) for HDFC Mid Cap Fund is CAMS. The AMC (HDFC Mutual Fund) registered address is "HDFC House", 2nd Floor, H. T. Parekh Marg, 165-166, BackbayReclamation, Churchgate Mumbai 400020.

sections.title: Scheme Description
sections.text: The scheme seeks to provide long-term capital appreciation/income by investing predominantly in Mid-Cap companies.
